heading: Omitted
label: 775 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, act , , , related to contributions for costs of management of lands and for surveying federally controlled lands, was from the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriation Act, 1961, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:May 13, 1960Pub. L. 86–455, title I74 Stat. 106, , .June 23, 1959Pub. L. 86–60, title I72 Stat. 93, , .June 4, 1958Pub.
